title: CISO & Data Protection Leader
headline: CISO & Executive Advisor
summary:
As Cloudinary's Chief Information Security Officer and Data Protection Leader, my main role (and goal) is to build the company's cyber security and privacy culture.

As a CISO and an X-RedTeamer, I emphasize the connection between the offensive and the defensive, working on improving Cloudinary's security posture on an ongoing basis, on all fronts. 

Maintaining and improving the security posture of a company requires a holistic approach. As such, I'm dividing my time between, 

• Business enablement. Our customers and their needs are our top priority.
• Compliance efforts (ISO 27001/27017/27018/27032/27701/27799/22301 and SOC 2 Type II, end-to-end ownership and execution).
• Leading Cloudinary's data protection efforts including all GDPR and CCPA related processes (end-to-end ownership and execution).
• DevOps/IT/R&D security related processes and architecture enhancements. 
• Product security. Working as a Product Manager around technical security and privacy requirements.
• Proactive offensive security operations.
• Manage Cloudinary's bug bounty program (bugcrowd.com/cloudinary).

title: Staff Solution Architect
headline: Solutions Architect
summary:
As a Staff Solution Architect at Cloudinary, I lead complex presales engagements and customer onboarding initiatives, acting as a trusted advisor for global brands evaluating and adopting Cloudinary’s platform. I specialize in media integrity, AI-driven workflows, large-scale asset migrations, C2PA standards, enhanced image/video analysis, and metadata automation. My role bridges technical depth and business strategy—partnering with sales, product, and engineering to design scalable solutions that align with customer goals.
	•	Actively involved in complex presales cycles, conducting technical deep-dives, scoping custom solutions, and articulating value propositions to executive stakeholders and technical teams.
	•	Designed and led onboarding strategies for enterprise customers, ensuring smooth handoffs from sales to delivery and accelerating time-to-value. Led large-scale asset migration projects, transitioning millions of assets.
	•	Worked closely with R&D to refine product capabilities, influencing API design, feature development, and scalability improvements. An early adopter of Implemented C2PA (Content Authenticity Initiative)
	•	Leveraged AI Vision, Amazon Rekognition AI, and Azure Video Indexer for advanced image/video analysis, AI-driven tagging, and content moderation.
	•	Integrated ChatGPT to automate metadata generation, enhance media searchability, and streamline DAM workflows.
	•	Utilized AWS CloudWatch, Kibana, and Coralogix for real-time log analysis, leveraged Catchpoint performance testing, mined data using Snowflake, and produced value-confirmation reports.
	•	Drove API integrations, workflow automation, and asset optimization strategies across multi-functional platforms.
	•	Led offshore development teams, ensuring seamless collaboration, deadline adherence, and enterprise alignment.
	•	Architected custom integrations and CDN customizations to support high-performance media workflows and meet unique customer needs at scale.

title: Chief Commercial Officer (CCO)
headline: Chief Commercial Officer, IntegriChain
summary:
I am thrilled to be joining the IntegriChain Executive Team! 

IntegriChain is uniquely positioned to help Pharma set and execute more profitable strategies in this challenging pricing, access, and regulatory environment. I look forward to playing an integral role in advancing IntegriChain’s mission and supporting the commercialization of our customers’ life-changing innovative science.

IntegriChain helps Pharma manufacturers bring their science to market, ensuring patients have affordable, timely, and sustainable access to therapy. We are doing this by building Pharma’s data-driven commercialization platform – from strategy to operational execution. Our unique focus on data, technology, consulting, and outsourcing helps connect the commercial, financial, and operational dimensions of drug access and profitability. IntegriChain enables pharmaceutical innovators to achieve better commercial outcomes by digitalizing daily and recurring business activities and by integrating data and operations across contracting, pricing, channel and distribution, and gross-to-net.

IntegriChain is backed by Nordic Capital, a leading sector-specialized private equity investor with a broad portfolio in Healthcare and Pharma. We are headquartered in Philadelphia, PA, with offices in Ambler, PA,  and Pune, India. For more information, visit www.integrichain.com, or follow on LinkedIn.

title: Business Lead
headline: Business Lead at IntegriChain
summary: Call upon several areas of expertise as part of the work to migrate existing customers from other GP systems or Excel into our home-grown GP system.  Those expertise include: - Advisory and Audit knowledge to know if GP calculations (CMS and VA)  that are currently being done adhere to legislative guidance and client expectations when approved methodology documents are or are not available. - Data Analyst knowledge to know if the data is coming from the client or 3PL in a manner that is correct and usable for a system or calculation, and to be able to make those adjustments so that it is accurate and usable.  Then configuring the portal for that data to be uploaded into the system. - Calculation Analyst knowledge to then take that uploaded data and ensure the calculation is using the details in the data, and the accompanying domains (which includes my assignment of COTs), in an expected and correct manner. - System Configure Specialist knowledge to translate all of the above items into a price type configuration, where the expected calculation result will generate and output from the system in a proper manner. - System and Calculation Test Lead knowledge to then put the configuration and the system through test procedures in order to confirm expectations are the result.  Also testing the system itself beyond price type and report configuration to ensure that the system is working correctly, efficiently, and in an optimal manner to give the best results to our clients. Using all of these skills in a holistic and correct manner to ensure from start to finish that each month our clients can have confidence in their GP calculations, while also training other staff to be able to configure and use the system as well.

title: CAE Designer
headline: State-certified technical engineer in the specialized field of machine technique (since 2021 Bachelor Professional of Engineering)
summary: Als Konstrukteur für NVH-Bauteile stehe ich an vorderster Front, um die Anforderungen unserer Kunden sowie interne Vorgaben umzusetzen. Mein Fokus liegt auf der präzisen Auslegung von Gummi-Metall-Kunststoff Bauteilen durch umfassende technische Berechnungen, mit dem Schwerpunkt auf "Kunstsoff". Darüber hinaus verantworte ich die Gestaltung von Metall- und Kunststoffkomponenten mithilfe linearer/nicht-linearer Softwaretools. Ein wesentlicher Teil meiner Arbeit umfasst die Erstellung detaillierter technischer Zeichnungen für Bauteile und Baugruppen, die die Standards des Geometric Dimensioning and Tolerancing (GD&T) erfüllen. Dabei lege ich besonderen Wert auf höchste Präzision und Durchführbarkeit in der Fertigung. Die KAnwendung von Best Practices und Lessons Learned bildet einen weiteren Schwerpunkt meiner Tätigkeit, insbesondere in Bezug auf Modellierung und Zeichnungserstellung. Durch diese Maßnahmen sichern wir nicht nur die Qualität unserer Produkte, sondern optimieren auch kontinuierlich unsere Prozesse. In enger Zusammenarbeit mit interdisziplinären Teams und der Verfahrenstechnik strebe ich stets nach standardisierten Prozessen und finde die optimale Lösung für jede kundenspezifische Anwendung. Mit fundierten Kenntnissen in CAD-Software wie Catia oder NX bin ich bestens gerüstet, um komplexe 3D-Modelle und technische Zeichnungen zu erstellen und zu verwalten. Meine analytischen Fähigkeiten und Kreativität ermöglichen es mir, mechanische Herausforderungen in präzise und funktionale Designs zu transformieren. Ein weiterer Schwerpunkt dieser Tätigkeit ist es, mein Wissen und meine Fähigkeiten auf dem neuesten Stand der Technik zu halten, indem ich kontinuierlich lerne und mich weiterentwickle. Als engagierter Teamplayer kommuniziere ich effektiv sowohl in Deutsch als auch auf Englisch, um sicherzustellen, dass unsere Projekte reibungslos und erfolgreich verlaufen.

title: FEA Engineer
headline: Senior FEA Engineer at Vibracoustic
summary: • Lead Design Optimization and Simulation activities at various stages ranging from concept development to design implementation. Worked closely with design engineers to understand project requirements and develop a plan of action for fast paced design competitions and tech reviews. • Created FEA models and conducted linear static and nonlinear analysis of powertrain components to ensure compliance with structural and modal requirements, using HYPERMESH and ABAQUS. • Performed structural topology, shape, and size optimization of Aluminium and Steel stamped brackets using OPTISTRUCT, resulting in designs lighter and easy to manufacture, yet durable enough to meet all customer specified performance targets. • Conducted durability analysis of rubber components to calculate damage at cyclic loads and calculated the static and dynamic rates of the proposed design. • Oversaw initial design analysis (CAD level FEA) activities within design groups as a CAE/Design liaison, ensuring that boundary conditions and loads were in alignment with those in high-fidelity CAE models. • Trained Entry level FEA Engineers in Vibracoustic FEA procedures and systems. Trained Design Engineers in creating proper FEA requests. • Worked collaboratively with global Vibracoustic FEA teams by identifying, adopting, and standardizing best practices. Supported FEA Development activities to ensure that updated methods and tools were successfully applied for an integrated analysis approach. Tested out newly rolled out procedures to confirm they operated correctly, catch and/or troubleshoot any possible bugs and establish co-relation with test results. • Managed projects, priorities, and resources to successfully meet department targets and customer commitments. For large programs, organized distribution of projects to global team members based on competencies; oversaw quality and timeliness of the results delivered. Show less

Principais resultados/projetos: Redução de custo em 2% de material direto e melhora na eficiência produtiva (PPH - peças por hora).
